zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield於1230年出生在威爾士安格萊特德拉斯時，她的父親Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd5歲，母親Adelicia or Eva verch Richard133歲。她於1240年與Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1314年在英國威爾斯安格萊利朗德享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield于1230年出生在威尔士安格萊特德拉斯时，她的父亲Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd5岁，母亲Adelicia or Eva verch Richard133岁。她于1240年与Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1314年在英国威尔斯安格萊利朗德享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: compound of iud ‘lord, prince’ + hael ‘generous’; borne in the Mabinogi by the son of Llarian.

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield was born in 1230, in Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales, her father, Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd, was 5 and her mother, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, was 133. She married Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY in 1240, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1314, in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield est née en 1230, à Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, avait 133 ans. Elle a épousé Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY en 1240, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1314, à Llangoed, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield 1230 in Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd 5 und ihre Mutter Adelicia or Eva verch Richard 133. Sie hat 1240 in Wales, United Kingdom Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1314 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield è nata il nel 1230 nel Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Galles, sua padre, Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd, aveva 5 anni e sua madre, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, aveva 133 anni. Lei sposato Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY nel 1240, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1314, nel Llangoed, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefieldが1230年にウェールズアングレセイトレフドラエスで生まれた時，父Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwdは5歳，母Adelicia or Eva verch Richardは133歳であった。1240年にイギリスウェールズでLord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1314年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイランゴエドで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield(이)가 1230년 웨일스 앤글레시 트레프드라이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd(은)는 5세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelicia or Eva verch Richard(은)는 133세였다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 웨일스에서 Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1314년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 랭드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield nasceu em 1230, em Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, tinha 133 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY em 1240, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1314, em Llangoed, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield родилась в 1230 г. в местности трефдрэет, англеси, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, 133. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY в 1240 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1314 г. в местности ллангоед, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield nació en 1230, en Trefdraeth, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd, tenía 5 años y su mamá, Adelicia or Eva verch Richard, tenía 133 años. Se casó con Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY en 1240, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1314, en Llangoed, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años.
